data.body:
## Description

**What**: Add artifact review and merge behavior to both onboarding and architect-foundation skills — all generated files are shown to the user for approval before writing, and existing files get diff-based review rather than full replacement.
**Why**: Currently the skills write output artifacts without giving the user a chance to review them. When re-running onboarding on a previously configured project, existing customizations in CLAUDE.md and dso-config.conf are silently overwritten.
**Scope**:
- IN: Add artifact review gate to both SKILL.md files — present all generated files for user approval before writing; when an artifact already exists (CLAUDE.md, dso-config.conf, .test-index), show a diff against existing rather than full replacement; handle the re-run case where files have accumulated project-specific customizations
- OUT: The content of what is generated (covered by Stories 2f87-5437, b36f-cb7c, 7ed8-deba); the auto-detection logic (Story 2f87-5437)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, both skills present all generated artifacts for user approval before writing to disk
  ← Satisfies: "Both skills present artifacts for review before writing"
- When this story is complete, when an artifact already exists, the skill shows a diff against the existing file rather than a full replacement
  ← Satisfies: "Both skills present artifacts for review before writing"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] The artifact review pattern is shared across both skills — define it consistently
- [Testing] Test via structural assertions that SKILL.md contains diff-before-write instructions
